description: Fail-closed admission rules. Any triggered halt_condition stops packet admission until receipt is issued.

fail_rules.name: mixed_manufacturer_no_zone_truth
fail_rules.trigger: assembly contains layers from more than one manufacturer family AND no zone_truth_receipt on file
fail_rules.halt_condition: packet admission blocked until single-manufacturer zone truth receipt or approved variance is issued

fail_rules.name: unsupported_hatch_type
fail_rules.trigger: hatch assembly_id not in approved hatch_packet assembly_resolution list OR curb height < 8in
fail_rules.halt_condition: hatch packet blocked until submittal updated with compliant hatch type and curb height confirmed

fail_rules.name: unresolved_delegated_design
fail_rules.trigger: condition requires_delegated_design == true AND no stamped engineer letter in evidence_refs
fail_rules.halt_condition: packet admission blocked; structural or waterproofing interface cannot proceed without delegated design on file

fail_rules.name: structural_no_attachment_rule
fail_rules.trigger: structural assembly present AND no attachment calculation or load-path document in packet evidence_refs
fail_rules.halt_condition: structural packet blocked; load path to primary structure must be documented before field installation

fail_rules.name: wp_correction_no_review_issue
fail_rules.trigger: waterproofing_correction_packet submitted AND no RFI or bulletin number linked in evidence_refs
fail_rules.halt_condition: correction packet blocked; all waterproofing corrections require a documented review issue (RFI or bulletin) before admission

fail_rules.name: evidence_not_tied_to_packet
fail_rules.trigger: evidence item exists in zone without a parent packet_family_id reference in its lineage
fail_rules.halt_condition: orphaned evidence item blocked from admission; all field evidence must be tied to a packet family and condition scope before compilation
